stemHtml: The co-pilot is assigned the role of communicating with ATC. The ATC relays to the co-pilot the clearance, and the co-pilot responds with an incorrect clearance. The ATC controller and the PIC fail to notice the co-pilot makes an incorrect read back. What errors have occurred?

options.a: Communication error by the co-pilot, PIC, and ATC.
options.b: Handling error by the co-pilot, and procedural error by the ATC and PIC.
options.c: Communication error by the co-pilot and ATC, handling error by the PIC.
options.d: Handling error by the co-pilot, and procedural error by the PIC.
